name: skycastle-antigravity
description: Wires the skycastle secrets-manager MCP daemon into Google Antigravity: one HTTP MCP server on port 8210 exposing secret CRUD (get/set/list/delete, versions, tags), KMS, certificates, SSH, secret-scanning, PAM, AI, and token tools, plus an operate skill. Additive — it augments the native tools, it does not replace them.
